name: codex-telegram
description: CodeX Telegram monorepo (bridge-core + desktop app + cloud relay)

scripts.setup: npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix packages/bridge-core install && npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix services/cloud-relay install && npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix apps/desktop install
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:relay && npm run build:desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix packages/bridge-core run typecheck && npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix services/cloud-relay run typecheck && npm_config_userconfig=$PWD/.npmrc npm --prefix apps/desktop run typecheck
